action_set_definitions.name: get_simulation_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation time and a list of active train identifiers in the environment.

action_set_definitions.name: get_train_status
action_set_definitions.description: Returns detailed telemetry and logistical data for a specific train, including position, delay, crew hours, customs status, and technical configurations.

train_id.description: The unique ID of the train.

action_set_definitions.name: get_infrastructure_map
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the layout of tracks, sidings, and handover points between two locations to find feasible routes or passing loops.

action_set_definitions.name: set_train_route
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns a train to a specific target segment or siding and locks the switches/signals for that path.

target_segment.description: The segment or loop ID to move the train to.

action_set_definitions.name: update_train_systems
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers the transition of the train's internal traction and signaling hardware for compatibility with receiving jurisdictions.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_logistics_clearance
action_set_definitions.description: Resolves administrative blocks such as customs clearance or scheduling crew relief shifts.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the environment clock, allowing trains to move according to their routes and for technical transitions to complete.

minutes.description: Number of minutes to advance the simulation.

action_set_definitions.name: confirm_handover
action_set_definitions.description: Submits a formal request to the receiving Infrastructure Manager (IM) to accept the train at the handover point.

state_description.trains: Dictionary of trains indexed by ID, containing current position, speed, and schedule delay.
state_description.infrastructure: Status of signals and track switches/points.
state_description.track_occupancy: Mapping of track segments to the ID of the train currently occupying them.
state_description.simulation_time: Current elapsed simulation time in minutes.
